_metadata.description: Lookup table of the 34 cached platform documentation files in source_docs/ — keyed by short_name, with platform, topic keywords, and source URL.
_metadata.runtime_strategy_rationale: 34 rows × ~5 fields each comfortably exceeds the 8000-token embed threshold defined in make_agent_knowledge.json → runtime_strategy_rules. Consumers retrieve at runtime via the host platform's file primitive (Anthropic Files API, OpenAI file_search vector store, Google Files API, xAI collections_search).

scope: Catalogs every doc currently cached in source_docs/*.md so consumers (doc_analysis_agent, merge_agent, future agents) can resolve a short_name to its platform / topic / URL without grepping the cache.

tool_choice, fallback handling, strict mode, parallel tool use, tool runner, MCP tools
agent SDK, agent loop, subagents, sessions, hooks, compaction, permissions

document content block, citations.enabled, cited_text, char/page/block indices, streaming citations_delta, incompatible with structured outputs

function calling, parallel/compositional calling, thinking models, MCP, Google Search built-in tool
response_mime_type, response_json_schema, JSON schema features, structured output vs function calling
system instruction patterns, persona/task/context/format, best practices, Gemini 3 template

cachedContent, implicit vs explicit caching, TTL/expire_time, min 1024 (Flash) / 4096 (Pro) tokens
Gem creation, 4 pillars (persona/task/context/format), knowledge files, system instructions, sharing

agents, handoffs, guardrails, lifecycle hooks, tool_choice, structured output, MCP, multi-agent patterns

sources: source_docs/_refresh_log.json (sources keys + fetch_status + size context for all 34 cached docs)
update_agents/doc_refresh_agent.json → primary_data.sources[] (platform, label, source_url, section_focus for each cached source)

pre_run_checklist: Each entry in consumed_by[] resolves to an existing agent spec OR is being generated in the same session (merge_agent.json was generated in this same dogfood pass)
post_run_checklist: knowledge/source_docs_index.md exists with all knowledge_md_required_sections present in order
knowledge/source_docs_index.json exists with shape='reference' and facts[] populated with 34 entries
consumed_by[] is non-empty (2 entries: doc_analysis_agent.json + merge_agent.json)
provenance.sources[] is non-empty (shape=reference requires this — KNW-QC-005)

changes: Initial knowledge file generated by make_agent_knowledge v1.0 during dogfood pass.
34 facts[] entries — one per cached source_docs/*.md (7 Anthropic + 10 Google ADK + 6 Google Gemini + 7 OpenAI + 4 xAI).
